---
title: "Fiji and the Fijians"
---

## Fiji and the Fijians

**Author:** James Calvert
**Date:** 1858
**Imprint:** London: Heylin

### Notes

This is Volume II, \'Mission History\' of a two part work of which the first was Thomas Williams, <i>Fiji: The Islands and Their Inhabitants</i>.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
